name: Migrate web stack from React/Vite to Next.js App Router
description: Migrate `apps/web` from React + Vite SPA to Next.js App Router with Node runtime target. Route contract changes: `/` becomes public landing page with CTA entry points, `/home` becomes protected home/overview, and all other existing app/auth paths remain stable. Includes PWA migration on Next, env contract rename from `VITE_*` to `NEXT_PUBLIC_*`, removal of Vite/react-router runtime surfaces, and direct-import cleanup for runtime-critical modules.
evidence: ExecPlan created at docs/exec-plans/plans/2026-04-29-feat-038-nextjs-app-router-migration.md and registered in docs/exec-plans/index.md Active section.
